claims.summary: Static fallback adjectives can become repetitive and displace genuine spectral nuance.
Fallback language should include movement and trajectory rather than only categorical state adjectives.
claims.disposition: verify dynamic-flow, kinetic-gradient, trajectory, and density-motion term families

claims.summary: High entropy should reduce dependence on a static compatibility tail while preserving texture.
claims.disposition: verify high-entropy compatibility-tail skip and entropy texture preservation

claims.summary: Current shadow and pressure context should determine which fallback descriptors are carried.
claims.disposition: verify weighted selector, lived fit, persistence review, and source metadata

claims.summary: Perceived flattening across a forced fallback cannot be established from term-selection source alone.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline output comparison with a right-to-ignore result card
